lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The engine and transmission function like new. The exterior is flawless with no paint chips, dents, or scratches. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows wear and some staining on the upholstery. All mechanical and electronic components are functional.
Good condition.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic vehicle! It’s in good condition and has been well cared for, offering a reliable and comfortable driving experience. While there are a few minor signs of wear from regular use, it still looks great and performs beautifully. This is a solid choice for anyone looking for a dependable car that’s ready for its next adventure!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver for someone prioritizing utility over aesthetics. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches on the passenger side and some clear coat peeling on the roof and hood. Inside, the cabin is clean but reflects years of use, with some visible wear on the driver's seat and a small crack in the dashboard plastics. Mechanically, the car is sound and starts reliably, though the suspension is becoming a bit soft and it will likely require new tires before the next winter season. All lights, wipers, and the air conditioning system are in good working order. It is a solid, functional car that has been maintained regularly, even if it lacks the polish of a newer model.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained by its previous owner. The exterior paint still holds a high gloss, though you will find a few minor rock chips on the front fascia and a small, shallow scratch near the trunk lid from regular use. Inside, the interior is very clean; the seats show only minimal wear and there are no tears or stains in the upholstery. All electronic features, including the backup camera and dual-zone climate control, are in perfect working order. Mechanically, the car drives smoothly with no known issues, and the service records indicate that all scheduled maintenance has been performed on time. It is a solid, dependable vehicle that offers a great balance of comfort and reliability.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled preservation. This vehicle maintains a showroom-grade aesthetic, reflecting a history of meticulous maintenance and uncompromising mechanical oversight. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior to the flawless exterior paint, remains in a state of absolute distinction. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning collector seeking a vehicle in its most pristine, original form.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot! I've taken incredible care of it, and it's been garage-kept and pampered since day one. If you're looking for a ride that’s virtually flawless and ready for a new home, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

Offered is a pristine example of the E92 M3, powered by the legendary 4.0L S65 naturally aspirated V8 featuring individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline. This specimen is equipped with the M-DCT dual-clutch transmission and an M Variable Differential Lock, ensuring surgical precision through corners. The chassis dynamics are managed by Electronic Damper Control (EDC), providing a flat cornering attitude without compromising compliance. Mechanical provenance is documented, including preventative rod bearing and throttle actuator services. The exterior retains a concours finish, complemented by forged alloy wheels and a carbon fiber roof panel for a lowered center of gravity. A true collector-grade atmospheric masterpiece.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No mechanical or cosmetic flaws.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines 'showroom condition.' This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage and has never seen inclement weather. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with absolutely zero swirl marks, rock chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium upholstery remains supple and free of any wear, while every electronic feature and safety system functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the vehicle is superlative, boasting a fully documented service history with all maintenance performed exclusively by certified technicians. With exceptionally low mileage and a clean title, this is a rare opportunity for a collector or discerning driver to own a piece of automotive excellence that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership floor.

We are proud to present this meticulously preserved vehicle, currently maintained to a standard that rivals its original showroom delivery state. This specimen exhibits no discernible wear, representing an investment-grade acquisition for the most discerning enthusiast. Every detail, from the flawless coachwork to the precision-engineered drivetrain, reflects a history of uncompromising stewardship. This is an unparalleled opportunity to secure a vehicle of rare caliber.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. Featuring an impeccable exterior finish and a flawlessly preserved interior, this unit offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. Mechanical integrity is absolute, ensuring a driving experience that is both refined and authoritative.

Hey there! I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied it since day one, so it's spotless inside and out. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Mint condition. Showroom quality. No mechanical or cosmetic defects. Clean title. Garage kept. Inspection reports available.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, boasting a flawless exterior with a deep, glass-like luster and a professional ceramic coating. There are absolutely no chips, swirls, or scratches to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in 'as-new' condition; the premium leather is supple and uncreased, the original floor mats are pristine, and it retains that distinct new-car scent. Every electronic component and mechanical system operates with precision. This car comes with a complete, documented service history, two sets of keys, and has never seen inclement weather. It is a true collector-grade example, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from a brand-new vehicle. For the buyer who accepts nothing less than the best, this is the one.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits no discernable wear, representing the pinnacle of its class in both mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom-grade condition, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects meticulous stewardship. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure performance that meets the most exacting standards. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands excellence without compromise, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly distinguished asset.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? Well, look no further! This beauty has been my absolute pride and joy, and it’s in truly spectacular condition. It’s been pampered since day one—always garaged and kept spotless inside and out. It drives like an absolute dream and looks even better in person. I’m honestly a little sad to see it go, but I know it’s going to make its next owner very happy! Come take a look and see for yourself!

This museum-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance. Under the hood, the S54 inline-six breathes through individual throttle bodies, delivering linear power to the rear wheels via a Getrag 6-speed manual and a factory limited-slip differential. This example boasts a reinforced rear subframe, a recently serviced double-VANOS system, and a flawless chassis free of typical fatigue. The suspension geometry remains precise, complemented by fresh bushings and OEM dampers for that signature communicative feedback. Mechanically synchronized and aesthetically impeccable, this is a turnkey collector-grade specimen.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Original paint. Perfect interior. Low mileage. Full service history included.

Presented in showroom condition, this vehicle is a true collector's dream. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, chips, or swirls, preserved by climate-controlled storage and meticulous detailing. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather still carries that new-car aroma, and every digital interface and tactile switch functions with factory precision. Mechanically, it is flawless, boasting a comprehensive service history with all maintenance performed exclusively by certified specialists. This car drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line—tight, responsive, and incredibly smooth. Included are all original keys, manuals, and a documented history of its care. This is quite simply the finest example on the market today, offering a 'like-new' experience for the discerning enthusiast.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting meticulous preservation of both its mechanical integrity and aesthetic excellence. Every detail reflects a standard of care reserved for the most discerning collectors. This is an exceptional opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example that surpasses the most rigorous inspections.

Presented in exemplary condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior, reflects a standard of care synonymous with showroom delivery. Mechanically superlative and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, this unit is curated for the discerning collector who demands absolute perfection.

Hey there! I'm so excited to show you this absolute gem. It’s been my pride and joy and is in truly pristine, showroom-quality condition—seriously, it looks and smells brand new! I’ve taken meticulous care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that feels fresh off the lot, you’ve found it. Come swing by and see it for yourself, you’re going to love it!

Offered is an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine condition. This example features the iconic S54 3.2L high-revving inline-six engine, boasting individual throttle bodies and a peak output of 333 hp. The powertrain is mated to a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a limited-slip differential, providing an unfiltered analog driving experience. Mechanically, this vehicle is impeccable: the rod bearings have been replaced, and the rear subframe has been professionally reinforced to ensure structural integrity. The suspension maintains its factory-fresh damping characteristics,
Mint condition. Garage kept. Original paint. Dealer maintained. No mechanical issues.

This pristine vehicle is a rare find, maintained to the highest standards. The exterior boasts a showroom-quality finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating that highlights the depth of the original paint. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh condition; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear, and the dashboard is completely free of sun damage or scratches. Mechanically, it is flawless, having been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a comprehensive history available for review. It drives as smoothly as the day it left the lot, with every electronic feature, sensor, and safety system operating perfectly. This is an investment-grade example for a discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine condition and representing the pinnacle of its class. Every detail of this motorcar reflects an uncompromising commitment to excellence, from its flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of showroom quality, offering an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast.
